question: Elli opens an account with a deposit of $1,200. This account earns 4% simple interest annually. How many years will it take for her $1,200 deposit to earn $432 interest?

solution.strategy: Simple interest I = P × r × t. Solve for t.

question: A deposit of $1,200 earns 4% simple interest annually. How many years until it earns $432 interest?

solution.strategy: I = P × r × t, so t = I / (P × r).
